name: Unhatched Embers
descs: When taking mortal damage, fix HP to 1 for the attack; Attack End: Heal 20% of max HP. (once per Encounter)

When taking mortal damage, fix HP to 1 for the attack; Attack End: Heal 20% of max HP. (once per Encounter)

If the affected unit has [Combustion]: fix HP to 1 for the attack; Attack End: Heal 30% of max HP instead. (once per Encounter for both this and the above effect)

When taking mortal damage, fix HP to 1 for the attack; Attack End: Heal 20% of max HP. (once per Encounter)

If the affected unit has [Combustion]: fix HP to 1 for the attack; Attack End: Heal 40% of max HP instead. (once per Encounter for both this and the above effect)
